User.title: User Profile
User.description: System profile settings for the operator including daily goal limits and billing tier.

id.description: Normalized identifier computed from lowercase email address

dailyGoal.description: Intended daily focus goal limit in hours

Task.title: Task Record
Task.description: Deconstructed atomic task or goal deconstruction block.

userId.description: Owner identifier matching the User profile document ID

description.description: Detailed specifications summarizing scope requirements and criticality triggers

deadline.description: ISO String or YYYY-MM-DD due mark

actualHours.description: Accumulated active pomodoro duration in hours

tags.description: Atomic skill or contextual workspace qualifiers

executionStrategy.description: System-provided tactical recommendation to maintain focus

Plan.title: AI Roadmap Plan
Plan.description: Structured timeline and hazard assessment parsed from loose natural language prompts.

userId.description: Owner identifier matching the User profile document ID

prompt.description: Loose objective prompt entered by the operator

summary.description: Strategic context executive summary compiled by Gemini

tasks.description: Compiled tasks scheduled under this roadmap

riskAssessment.description: Hazard forecasting assessment isolating context drift vectors

timeline.description: Milestone phases mapping progressive sequence layers

isApproved.description: Approval status to merge compiled roadmap tasks into operational sprint backlog

Session.title: Focus Session Record
Session.description: A completed deep work run tracked within neural acoustic Chambers.

userId.description: Owner identifier matching the User profile document ID

taskId.description: Associated task target identifier, if targeted specifically

completed.description: True if full duration completed without manual ejection

Notification.title: System Notification
Notification.description: Critical alerts, triage advice, and compliance monitoring logs compiled by the OS scheduler.

users.description: Global storage collection mapping user-specific SaaS workspace profiles.

tasks.description: Backlog items, goals, and deconstructed milestones assigned to operators.

plans.description: AI-generated strategic plans and schedule forecasts awaiting operator approval.

sessions.description: Completed work sessions tracking active performance and metrics data.

notifications.description: Operational alerts and real-time triage guidance messages.
